name: Improper Neutralization of CRLF Sequences in HTTP Headers ('HTTP Request/Response Splitting')
description: The product includes user-controlled data in HTTP headers without neutralizing CR and LF characters, allowing attackers to inject additional HTTP headers or split the response to create a second forged HTTP message (response splitting).
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides user-controlled data that is placed into EGRESS[http_header] values without a TRANSFORM[crlf_strip] node that removes or rejects CR (\r) and LF (\n) characters before the header is written to the HTTP response
